response: I understand you're concerned about your test score and its impact on your application. However, HackerRank support cannot directly intervene in candidate evaluations or alter test scores. As mentioned in the documentation, if you have concerns about the test content, you should reach out to the recruiter or hiring team directly.

response: You can pause your HackerRank subscription temporarily instead of canceling it. To do so, navigate to Settings > Billing > Cancel Plan, and then select a pause duration between 1 and 12 months. Please note that this feature is only available for monthly subscriptions to Individual Monthly, Basic, or Interview Monthly plans that have been active for at least 30 days.
justification: The documentation provides clear instructions on how to pause a subscription.

response: I am sorry to hear that Claude has stopped responding. According to the documentation, if Claude stopped working on a task, ensure that the Claude Desktop app was open throughout the entire task. If the app was closed or your computer went to sleep, the session may have ended.
justification: The documentation provides troubleshooting steps for when Claude stops working.

response: If your identity has been stolen and it involves your Visa card, visit our Lost or Stolen card page to learn how to cancel your card or get an emergency replacement card. You can also report a phone scam that uses Visa's name by contacting us.
justification: The documentation directly addresses identity theft and provides instructions on what to do.

response: The HackerRank Resume Builder helps you create a professional resume. You can build from scratch using a template or import an existing resume in .doc, .docx, or .pdf format. To access it, log in to HackerRank Community, click the App Switcher (grid icon), and select Resume Builder.
justification: The documentation describes how to access and use the resume builder.

response: You can update the name on your certificate only once per account. To update the name on your certificate: Open your certificate page. In the **Full Name** field, enter the name you want to display. Click **Regenerate Certificate**. In the confirmation dialog, click **Update Name**.
justification: The documentation clearly explains how to update the name on a certification.

response: To dispute a charge, please contact your issuer or bank using the freephone number located on the front or back of your Visa card. In many cases, your issuer or bank will require detailed information regarding the transaction before resolving the disputed charge.

response: To prevent Anthropic's crawlers from accessing your website, you need to modify the robots.txt file in your top-level directory. Add "User-agent: ClaudeBot Disallow: /" to this file for every subdomain you wish to opt out from. This ensures that ClaudeBot respects the 'do not crawl' signal.
justification: The documentation provides clear instructions on how to block Anthropic's crawlers using the robots.txt file.

response: Visa cards can be used for cash withdrawals at ATMs worldwide displaying the Visa PLUS logo. You can locate ATMs using the Visa ATM locator. Additionally, if your card is lost or stolen, Visa's Global Customer Assistance Services (GCAS) can provide emergency cash services.
justification: The documentation mentions ATM withdrawals and emergency cash services through GCAS.
